title: 8.6 Authorizing entities to lay, build, operate or expand natural gas pipelines, Amendment Regulation, 2014
description: 8.6 Authorizing entities to lay, build, operate or expand natural gas pipelines, Amendment Regulation, 2014

Wakeat Wa, swest (31) [ferarcet 1/4/areTeoT/ 188/13] ure fecsoh: aor faferaat at orar fer. 340(31), fear 06/05/2008 gant Hftrafea fear ara ar HR aeweare arar fet. 802(31), ate 19/11/2008, ara. 769(31), fea 20/10/2009, aa. 38(31), Ree 18/01/2010, arar.fe. 480(31), feet 07/06/2010 ae ararfet. 594(31), fee 09/07/2010 aart Bef fear rar al -- 1 of 2 -- 8 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART III—SEc. 4] NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 17th February, 2014 F, No. PNGRB/M(C)/48.—In exercise of the powers conferred by Section 61 of the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board Act, 2006 (19 of 2006), the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board hereby makes the following regulations, namely:- 1. Short title and commencement. (1) These regulations may be called the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board (Authorizing Entities to Lay, Build, Operate or Expand Natural Gas Pipelines) Amendment Regulations, 2014. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. Amendment of regulation 11. In regulation 11 of the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board (Authorizing Entities to Lay, Build, Operate of Expand Natural Gas Pipelines) Regulations, 2008, after sub-regulation (4), the following sub-regulation shall be inserted, namely:- “(5) The authorized entity will, in addition to transportation tariff, be allowed to charge shippers for additional compression charges mentioned in sub-regulation 4 and Imbalance Management Services as allowed under the relevant regulations of the Board.” : K. RAJESWARA RAO, OSD(R) [ADVT. ITI/4/Exty./188/13] Foot Note : Principal regulations were notified vide GSR 340(E), dated 06/05/2008 and subsequently amended vide GSR 802(E), dated 19/11/2008, GSR 769(E), dated 20/10/2009, GSR 38(E), dated 18/01/2010, GSR 480(E), dated 07/06/2010 and GSR 594(E), dated 09/07/2010. Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
